calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Santos K. Burgos is present.
Dolores Shong appearing for the plaintiff through limited scope.

Defendant Lucia Manriguez is present.
Benjamin MacLean representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 609 Brunswick St. San Francisco, California 94112.

This case settled, the trial date of March 17, 2008 is vacated.
